# Attachment.png*Created: Monday, February 12, 2024 at 8:51:41?PM*<div><b><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/png;base64,"/><br></b><b><h1><br></h1></b></div>
<div><b><h1>You</h1></b></div>
<div><h1>I have a negotiations chat for 1 hour today with the CEO regarding the position for the business development manager role - i have notes from my career coach to go into the negotates with the following insight and need an outline with these insights to guide me on this conversation so I cover this making sure he speaks on the numbers first and come back to make as high of a salary before commission as possible due to how long it will take to establish myself + being able to do Marketing on top for the USA market when needed to combine business development with digital marketing to really drive the conversations:</h1></div>
<div><h1><br></h1></div>
<div><h1>My career coach: You can have base 90k and 3k month for 6 months because commission wonšt kick in for awhile. This way you can for sure realize at least 108k for first year if no commission -if 100k feels too steep for him. Ask how he computed the commission to get to 150k. If you are also doing go to market strategy perhaps total comp would hope to be more╔be $175+. Donšt scare him by asking too much. but show confidence. Ask smart questions. Good luck!</h1></div>
<div><h1><br></h1><h1>Short term long term </h1></div>
<div><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<ul>
<li>Commission structure</li>
<li>Hours</li>
</ul>
<div><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<ul>
<li>100K base with over a 3 month period sign on bonus 5K</li>
<li>Starting from scratch and experience shows it will take time to get commission</li>
<li><br></li>
<li>Išve given it a lot of thought and to be perfectly honest I understand that based on my value of what it takes to do GTMS sales whole nine years, I feel that itšs 100K base. </li>
<li>How did you come up with getting 80-100K commission </li>
<li>If you are looking for someone at this level which I am ready to be operating at the base needs to come up </li>
<li>Who got KFC and Yahoo? What role? How did that happen?</li>
<li>What does a 30 60 90 days look like </li>
<li><b>Think of the questions you wish you ask at Slingshot - ask those questions</b></li>
<li><br></li>
<li>You said 150 comp for first year - sounds reasonable - but what I need is a lot of that up front because the product is new, Išm breaking into this market and doing strategy at the same time. </li>
<li>So what was the commission structure you were looking at for this product and what is the history of this product in the US? Who got Yahoo and KFC? How long did it take to sell? What soft leads do you have already? <br></li>
</ul>
